description: Local-first, auditable memory layer for Codex, Claude Code, AI apps, and any MCP client, with durable SQLite, embedding-free recall, and opt-in governed writeback.

notes: The local standalone MCP server requires no authentication; goodmemory_remember is exposed only with --allow-write.

clients: other MCP clients with stdio support

notes: Metadata matches the v0.5.1 capability descriptor and standalone MCP tool surface.
